description: Vendure is an open-source, self-hostable headless commerce platform for B2B and omnichannel ecommerce. It provides a TypeScript/NestJS backend, admin tooling, and extensibility features for building custom commerce systems.
summary: Vendure exposes tenant-hosted GraphQL APIs for shop and admin use plus a public npm-distributed CLI; docs also mention developer-extensible REST endpoints, but no separate fixed public REST API surface or auth mechanics were confirmed from the public docs scraped.
